title: Infuse S1 Revamp
body:
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ee03a71759952f13de9a40098838170d11a47f0.png)

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16684009ebeec99f6558120d6fae93d4a01eaf7e.png)](https://discord.gg/xT5Drv84ab)

[![Craftlands](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1456750543254061199/1457164304016085246/CREATE_SERVER_6.png?ex=695b0182&is=6959b002&hm=a2cb2f7c066a0720fb2c2c4731c303fe0ba9aabc6e13418454c31a8482656f0b&)](https://portal.craftlands.host/aff.php?aff=137)

You **MUST** join the Discord to access the pack.

The popular infuse pack will **NOT** work with this

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sAMATfyZPJk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The Infuse SMP Plugin adds a new layer of fun and creativity to your Minecraft server with fully custom effects that grant powerful, overpowered abilities. Players can unlock, activate, drain, and infuse abilities through a mix of commands, brewing, and gameplay mechanics, creating endless combinations of effects and playstyles.

## Commands:
/lspark | /rspark – Activate your first or second ability

/cleareffect <player> – Clear a player’s current custom effects

/seteffect <player> <effect> – Set a specific effect for a player

/ldrain | /rdrain – Drain your first or second ability into a condensed bottle for trading

/infuses – Open a custom GUI to manage or extract effects


## Mods:
You can get the mod  [Command Keys](https://modrinth.com/mod/commandkeys) to activate the abilities instead of offhand | shift+offhand!

## Recipes:
All items and potions from this plugin are crafted with a brewing stand like in the SMP.
